spec.action_partition_description: seeded source-local recursive one-third partition of outgoing edge keys
spec.expected_compression_target: three one-third contraction blocks plus base tier
spec.leakage_risk_statement: Uses only stable source states and outgoing edge identities, not rewards, terminal outcomes, learned values, or future episode results.
spec.state_partition_description: identity state keys; runtime contraction is edge-driven
